name: AstroPaperStarter
notes: Official AstroPaper snapshot with src/data/blog layout compatible with this editor. Docker is patched to build Astro with pnpm and serve the generated dist folder through nginx on localhost:4321. Starter blog content is replaced with three AstroPaperEditor beginner guide posts, unused demo files in src/assets/images are removed, and src/config.ts reads src/user-settings.json plus Docker preview URL environment values.
